description: Data extracted from a Sunshine Cleaning call by SunnyBee AI. This schema is used in VAPI's analysis.structuredData configuration.

state.description: Property state abbreviation (GA, FL, TX, NY, MA)

propertyType.description: Type of property to be cleaned

sqft.description: Approximate square footage of the property

isOccupied.description: Whether the property is currently occupied

conditionLevel.description: Current cleanliness condition: light (routine), moderate (visible dirt), heavy (strong buildup)

frequency.description: How often the service should repeat

addOns.description: Additional areas/services requested: inside_oven, inside_fridge, inside_cabinets, baseboards, blinds, walls, garage, laundry, pet_hair, organization

preferredSchedule.description: Preferred days and time of day (e.g., 'weekday mornings', 'Saturday afternoon')

language.description: Language the caller spoke during the call

contactPreference.description: How the caller prefers to be contacted

outcome.description: Call outcome based on the conversation

notes.description: Any additional notes or special requests mentioned by the caller
